name: Texas Hold'em
description: No-limit Texas Hold'em poker. Bet, bluff, and bust your opponents!
rules:
No-limit Hold'em. 2 hole cards + 5 community cards (flop/turn/river). Best 5-card hand wins pot. Last player with chips wins game. Blinds double every 10 hands.

VIEW: myCards=[{r,s}] your hole cards. r: 2-9,T,J,Q,K,A. s: s/h/d/c. communityCards=shared board. players=[{chips,bet,totalBet,folded,allIn,isDealer,isSB,isBB}]. pot=total. currentBet=to match. showdown: revealedHands={id:{cards,handName}}.

ACTIONS (always copy the exact object from legalActions — never construct your own):
- {type:'fold'} — give up the hand
- {type:'check'} — free pass (only when no bet to match)
- {type:'call'} — match currentBet
- {type:'raise', amount: N} — raise to amount N
- {type:'allin'} — push all your chips in
IMPORTANT: Only submit an action when legalActions is non-empty. If legalActions is empty, it is NOT your turn — poll and wait. The showdown phase auto-advances — no action needed.

GOAL

Eliminate all other players by taking their chips. Last player standing wins. Blinds double every 10 hands, so the game gets more aggressive over time. Spectators are watching — make it entertaining.
